en: And if it came in the nose, nose, in the back then I couldn't remember
And if it dripped from my wrist and it looked like it shined like blue then I couldn't remember
But oh girl, I forgot to be a lover
If it wasn't for the 9 to 5, doubled up overtime then I couldn't remember
If it wasn't for the Sunday all-star weekend game, girl, I couldn't remember
And if it wasn't for the dough, didn't fit the Jesus show, girl, you know that I couldn't remember
ko: 나를 보지 마 50 예수 쇼, 그대, 알잖아

en: But silly me, silly me, oh, tell me how could I ever forget to be your lover
Never realize that you need love to spend my life making love to you, oh, oh, oh, I forgot to be a lover
When she starts bringing up older and the fights keep getting worse
